name: WEYCO GRP INC.  DL 1
summary: Weyco Group, Inc. designs and markets footwear under a portfolio of brands, including Florsheim, Nunn Bush, Stacy Adams, BOGS, and Rafters. The company sells its products through wholesale channels, including department stores, chain stores, independent retailers, and catalogs, as well as through its own e-commerce websites. Weyco Group is headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin.
